mnemonics: Best Linear Unbiased Predictor (BLUP): A 'BLUP' forecast is the Best you can get, it's Linear, Unbiased, and has the smallest Prediction error.
keyPoints: The MMSE forecast is the conditional expectation of a future value, given the information available up to the present time.
The forecast errors for an optimal MMSE forecast are uncorrelated with a mean of zero.
The variance of the forecast errors increases as the forecast horizon extends further into the future.
commonMistakes: Confusing the properties of the forecast (which is a point estimate) with the properties of the forecast errors.
Assuming forecast errors are correlated, which would imply the forecast is not optimal and information from past errors could improve it.
Using an inadequate model for the time series, which will lead to forecasts that are not truly MMSE, even if the formula is applied correctly.
